block.name: openclaw_hook.py: gate TonicEngine load on latent_engine_enabled (#131)
acceptance_criteria: TonicEngine block in openclaw_hook.py is wrapped in `if tonic_config.latent_engine_enabled:`
latent_engine_enabled=True path: guard does not prevent engine load (default behavior unchanged)

outputs.name: openclaw_hook.py
outputs.contract: TonicEngine block gated on latent_engine_enabled; all other logic unchanged

never: Do not modify neuro_foundation.py or any other protected NeuroGraph file
Do not change TonicThread initialization, _post_cycle_hook wiring, or any code outside the latent engine block
Do not restart any running service
Do not modify Syl's checkpoint files
anti_drift: Only add the latent_engine_enabled guard. Do not refactor, rename, or restructure any other part of openclaw_hook.py.

steps.description: Count latent_engine_enabled occurrences in non-comment code lines

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('/home/josh/NeuroGraph/openclaw_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; print(sum(1 for l in lines if 'latent_engine_enabled' in l))"

steps.description: Apply guard only if not already present

params.command:
python3 -c "
import base64, os
script = base64.b64decode(b'''''').decode()
with open('/tmp/ng131_patch.py', 'w') as f:
    f.write(script)
print('SCRIPT_WRITTEN')
"

if_false.description: Guard already present — nothing to do

steps.description: Confirm latent_engine_enabled guard is present in non-comment code

params.command: python3 -c "lines=[l for l in open('/home/josh/NeuroGraph/openclaw_hook.py') if not l.lstrip().startswith('#')]; print(sum(1 for l in lines if 'latent_engine_enabled' in l))"

cd /home/josh/NeuroGraph && git add openclaw_hook.py && git diff --cached --stat && git commit -m 'Gate TonicEngine load on latent_engine_enabled in openclaw_hook.py (#131)' && git push && echo CANONICAL_DONE

python3 << 'PYEOF'
import sys
path = '/home/josh/docs/punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md'
c = open(path, encoding='utf-8').read()
if '| 131 |' not in c:
    print('FAILED: #131 row not found'); sys.exit(1)
row_start = c.index('| 131 |')
row_end = c.index('\n', row_start)
row = c[row_start:row_end]
if '**DONE**' in row:
    print('PUNCHLIST_ALREADY_DONE'); sys.exit(0)
new_row = row.replace('| OPEN |', '| **DONE** (2026-04-20) — BLK-NG-131: if tonic_config.latent_engine_enabled guard added; latent_engine_enabled: False now correctly skips engine load without affecting TonicThread |')
if new_row == row:
    print('FAILED: could not find OPEN status in row'); sys.exit(1)
open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8').write(c[:row_start] + new_row + c[row_end:])
print('PUNCHLIST_UPDATED')
PYEOF

steps.description: Commit punchlist update to docs repo

params.command: cd /home/josh/docs && git add punchlist/PUNCHLIST.md && git commit -m '#131 DONE: gate TonicEngine on latent_engine_enabled (BLK-NG-131)' && git push && echo DOCS_DONE
